nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Template for local environment variables covering Postgres/Redis/MinIO connection strings, Anthropic and OpenAI API keys, YouTube Data API OAuth credentials, and Remotion Lambda deployment settings (RENDER_TARGET, AWS creds, function/serve URLs).

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Authoritative instructions doc for Claude Code defining the project's prime directives (sacred video JSON contract, Phase-1-first, frozen payloads, idempotent jobs), locked stack decisions, Remotion animation conventions, data conventions, the round-selection scoring heuristic, and quality bars that must pass before any phase is done.
nodes.languageNotes: Written as a directive spec for an AI coding agent rather than human onboarding docs — every rule is phrased as an enforceable constraint ("never", "must", "do not re-litigate").

nodes.name: GETTING_STARTED.md
nodes.summary: Step-by-step walkthrough for handing the project to Claude Code: prerequisites, repo creation, the exact Phase 0+1 kickoff prompt to paste in, how to iterate on visuals via Remotion Studio, running later phases, and which legally-sourced assets (music, SFX, fonts, product images) must be sourced manually.

nodes.name: PROJECT_PLAN.md
nodes.summary: The project's source-of-truth architecture and roadmap document: product vision, full technology stack rationale, system architecture diagram, monorepo layout, data layer design (Category/Brand/Product/SpecDefinition/SpecValue/Comparison), the Zod VideoInput video-JSON contract, the end-to-end pipeline walkthrough, audio/legal licensing checklist, and the six-phase build roadmap (skeleton through scale-and-polish).

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Public-facing project overview describing Versus Engine's category-agnostic data/rendering split, its six key features (six-scene video template, per-category theming, data-driven round selection, A/B thumbnails, dashboard, optional AI narration, Lambda scaling, analytics feedback loop, automation), architecture diagram, tech stack table, getting-started commands, and monorepo project layout.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Local development stack definition provisioning Postgres 16, Redis 7, and MinIO (S3-compatible object store) with health checks and persistent named volumes, matching the connection settings expected by .env.example.
nodes.languageNotes: Each service defines a healthcheck (pg_isready, redis-cli ping, mc ready) so dependent workers/dashboard can wait for true readiness rather than just port availability.

nodes.name: postgres
nodes.summary: Postgres 16 Alpine service for the primary relational datastore (Category/Brand/Product/Comparison/etc.), exposed on 5432 with a persistent volume and pg_isready healthcheck.

nodes.name: redis
nodes.summary: Redis 7 Alpine service backing BullMQ job queues (ingest/render/publish workers), exposed on 6379 with a persistent volume.

nodes.name: minio
nodes.summary: MinIO service acting as an S3-compatible dev asset store for product images, rendered videos, and thumbnails, exposing the API on 9002 and the console on 9003.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Root pnpm workspace manifest declaring the private monorepo, Node 20+/pnpm 9.15.0 engine constraints, and the top-level scripts (dev/build/lint/typecheck/test/render/db:*/ingest/batch/worker/youtube:auth/lambda:*/analytics:sync) that delegate to Turborepo and per-package filters.

nodes.name: pnpm-workspace.yaml
nodes.summary: Declares the pnpm workspace scope, including all packages under apps/ and packages/ so the monorepo resolves internal dependencies via workspace links.

nodes.name: skills-lock.json
nodes.summary: Lockfile pinning the exact versions (via content hashes) of ten Remotion agent skills (mediabunny, remotion-best-practices, remotion-captions, remotion-create, remotion-docs, remotion-interactivity, remotion-markup, remotion-render, remotion-saas, remotion-upgrade) installed from remotion-dev/skills for Claude Code, ensuring reproducible AI-assisted Remotion development.

nodes.name: tsconfig.base.json
nodes.summary: Shared base TypeScript compiler configuration for the monorepo: ES2022 target/module with Bundler resolution, strict mode enabled, isolated modules, and relaxed unused-locals/params checks, intended to be extended by each app/package's own tsconfig.

nodes.name: turbo.json
nodes.summary: Turborepo task-pipeline configuration defining build/dev/lint/typecheck/test/render tasks, their cross-package dependency ordering (`^build`), output caching globs, and which tasks (dev, render) are persistent/uncached.
